data.name: copy-to-clipboard
data.description: Copy a literal string to the system clipboard.

data.name: disk-usage
data.description: What's using disk space: filesystem fill (df) plus the largest top-level directories under / (du), ranked. Use for 'what's taking up space / disk full / largest folders'.

data.name: list-drives
data.description: List mounted drives / volumes.

data.name: lock-screen
data.description: Lock the workstation.

data.name: open-control-panel
data.description: Open a Windows Control Panel page by canonical name (powercfg.cpl, ncpa.cpl, appwiz.cpl, sysdm.cpl, mmsys.cpl, timedate.cpl, ...).

data.name: open-folder
data.description: Open a folder in the OS file manager (Files / Explorer).

data.name: open-shell-folder

data.name: os-control-health

data.name: read-clipboard
data.description: Read the current clipboard contents.

data.name: reboot
data.description: Reboot the host (WRITE).

data.name: reveal-in-folder
data.description: Reveal a single file in its containing folder, selected.

data.name: run-bash
data.description: Run a bash command and return stdout (READ-ONLY).

data.name: run-powershell
data.description: Run a PowerShell command and return stdout (READ-ONLY by default; the agent should only emit read commands like Get-* / Test-* / Resolve-* / Measure-*).

data.name: service-status
data.description: systemctl is-active + status snapshot for a Linux service (READ). Pass the unit name as `service`.

data.name: show-network
data.description: Show active network adapters + IPs.

data.name: show-process
data.description: Show top processes by CPU / memory.

data.name: shutdown
data.description: Shutdown the host (WRITE -- requires MIOS_OS_RECIPE_WRITE=1).

data.name: toast
data.description: Show a notification toast.

data.description: Run a SHORT one-off code snippet / command in an isolated sandbox (bubblewrap: read-only system, writable scratch only, NO network by default, resource caps + timeout). lang: bash (default) | python.
